meaning: n.[蛹望諱呈ｲｸ諤ｧ,蜈ｱ豐ｸ諤ｧ,蜈ｱ豐ｸ邇ｰ雎｡
examples: The possibility of unique azeotropy or polyazeotropy in a liquid mixture can be predicted using activity coefficient models in terms of boiling point calculation.
As the one of the preferred embodiment, the method USES hog still to remove water and aromatic hydrocarbon organic solvent azeotropy generated in the dehydration reaction.
The halogen exchange method to prepare p fluoronitrobenzene under microwave irradiation and conventional heat was studied. Drying KF by azeotropy and microwave irradiation was proposed.
